scripts.types:sync: pnpm types:build && services/python-generator/.venv/bin/datamodel-codegen --input packages/types/generated/manifest.schema.json --input-file-type jsonschema --output services/python-generator/scripts/schemas/video_manifest.py && services/python-generator/.venv/bin/datamodel-codegen --input packages/types/generated/api.schema.json --input-file-type jsonschema --output services/python-generator/scripts/schemas/api_models.py && services/python-generator/.venv/bin/datamodel-codegen --input packages/types/generated/table.schema.json --input-file-type jsonschema --output services/python-generator/scripts/schemas/table_models.py && services/python-generator/.venv/bin/datamodel-codegen --input packages/types/generated/progress-event-type.schema.json --input-file-type jsonschema --output services/python-generator/scripts/schemas/progress_event_type.py
scripts.logs:ws-connect: aws logs tail $(aws logs describe-log-groups --log-group-name-prefix /aws/lambda --query "logGroups[?contains(logGroupName, 'ShortgenProgressApiRouteConnect')].logGroupName | [0]" --output text) --follow --format short
scripts.upload:assets: sh -c 'set -a; [ -f apps/web/.env ] && . apps/web/.env; set +a; [ -z "$SHORTGEN_BUCKET_NAME" ] && { echo "SHORTGEN_BUCKET_NAME not set"; exit 1; }; aws s3 cp public/background_music.mp3 s3://$SHORTGEN_BUCKET_NAME/assets/background_music.mp3 --acl bucket-owner-full-control'
